description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a dark metallic body and a tan, ribbed fore-end that suggests enhanced grip and heat dissipation. The barrel is short and thick, with a prominent muzzle and reinforced shroud, giving it a compact, urban-ready appearance. The receiver is angular and blocky, with visible mechanical details and a large, circular element on the side, possibly for mounting accessories. The trigger area is protected by a squared, sturdy guard, and the grip is ergonomic, designed for secure handling. There is no visible full stock, instead, the rear terminates in a compact, squared end, indicating a pistol grip configuration. The overall finish is matte and grippy, with a utilitarian color scheme suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a dark metallic body, tan ribbed fore-end, and pistol grip, designed for urban use. Features a short barrel, squared trigger guard, and robust, angular receiver.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, reinforced muzzle and ribbed fore-end, emphasizing the shotgun's compact barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tan ribbed fore-end, angular receiver, and large circular side detail, with the pistol grip and squared rear end visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact, squared rear end and the alignment of the receiver and grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the ribbed fore-end, angular receiver, and pistol grip from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with reinforced shroud and ribbed fore-end
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, robust trigger guard with a wide opening and reinforced edges
